  "findings": [
    "Hangers installed with empty nail holes — required fasteners missing",
    "Connector capacity reduced below manufacturer-listed values due to incomplete nailing",
    "Non-compliant with Simpson installation requirements and IRC connector fastener provisions"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install all missing hanger nails per Simpson catalog schedule for the specific connector model",
    "Verify nail type, diameter, and length match manufacturer requirements — do not substitute",
    "Re-inspect all connectors after correction to confirm full fastener count"
  ],
  "rationale": "Simpson hangers are rated based on full installation with specified nails in every hole. Empty holes mean the connector cannot achieve its published load capacity, creating a structural deficiency. The IRC requires connectors to be installed per manufacturer instructions, so missing fasteners constitute a code violation.",
  "references": [
    "Simpson Strong-Tie catalog installation requirements",
    "IRC R301.1.1 / R602 — connectors installed per manufacturer listing",
    "IRC R104.11 alternative materials and methods require listed installation"
  ]
}
